name: brad-search-php-sdk
description: Refactor the Brad Search PHP SDK v2 endpoint implementation to use strict, immutable ValueObjects instead of raw arrays. Ensures type safety, validation at construction time, and precise alignment with the OpenAPI v2 specification.

userStories.title: Create base ValueObject infrastructure
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a base infrastructure for immutable ValueObjects so that all domain objects follow consistent patterns.
acceptanceCriteria: All ValueObjects implement `JsonSerializable` returning API-compatible structure

userStories.title: Create LocalizedField helper
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a LocalizedField helper so that I can easily generate locale-suffixed field names (e.g., `name_lt-LT`).
acceptanceCriteria: Constructor accepts base field name and locale (e.g., `new LocalizedField('name', 'lt-LT')`)
Supports `withLocale()` method for immutable locale changes
Unit tests verify locale validation and string generation

userStories.title: Create FieldDefinition ValueObject and Builder
userStories.description: As a developer, I want FieldDefinition ValueObjects so that index field mappings are type-safe and validated.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `FieldDefinitionBuilder` with fluent API: `name(string)`, `type(FieldType)`, `addAttribute(VariantAttribute)`, `build()` returns immutable `FieldDefinition`
Constructor validation: name required, type must be valid enum
`jsonSerialize()` outputs exact structure matching OpenAPI `FieldDefinition` schema
Unit test compares output against OpenAPI example for Darbo drabuziai fields

userStories.title: Create IndexCreateRequest ValueObject and Builder
userStories.description: As a developer, I want IndexCreateRequest ValueObject so that index creation requests are validated and match API schema.
acceptanceCriteria: Validates at least one locale and one field required
Unit test compares output against OpenAPI 'Darbo drabuziai client' example

userStories.title: Create SearchFieldConfig ValueObject and Builder
userStories.description: As a developer, I want SearchFieldConfig ValueObject so that search field configurations are type-safe.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `SearchFieldConfigBuilder` with fluent API and `with*()` methods
Unit tests verify validation boundaries and JSON output

userStories.title: Create FuzzyMatchingConfig ValueObject
userStories.description: As a developer, I want FuzzyMatchingConfig ValueObject so that fuzzy matching settings are validated.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests verify defaults and validation

userStories.title: Create PopularityBoostConfig ValueObject
userStories.description: As a developer, I want PopularityBoostConfig ValueObject so that popularity boost settings are validated.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests verify validation and defaults

userStories.title: Create QueryConfigurationRequest ValueObject and Builder
userStories.description: As a developer, I want QueryConfigurationRequest ValueObject so that query configurations are complete and validated.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `QueryConfigurationRequest` immutable ValueObject with all properties from schema
Validates: at least one search_field required, min_score between 0.0 and 1.0
Unit test compares output against OpenAPI 'advanced' configuration example

userStories.title: Create SynonymConfiguration ValueObject
userStories.description: As a developer, I want SynonymConfiguration ValueObject so that synonym settings are validated.
acceptanceCriteria: Validates: synonyms array not empty, each entry is non-empty string
Unit test compares output against OpenAPI 'ecommerce-en' example

userStories.title: Create ImageUrl ValueObject
userStories.description: As a developer, I want ImageUrl ValueObject so that image URL structures are consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: `jsonSerialize()` outputs object with size keys matching API examples
Unit tests verify URL validation and JSON structure

userStories.title: Create BulkOperation ValueObjects
userStories.description: As a developer, I want BulkOperation ValueObjects so that bulk sync operations are type-safe and match the documented structure.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `BulkOperationType` enum with value: `index_products` (extendable for future types)
Create `Product` immutable ValueObject with all product fields from example + `variants` collection
Create `ProductBuilder` with fluent API for complex product construction
`jsonSerialize()` outputs exact structure matching the 'darbo-drabuziai-indexing' example
Unit test compares output against OpenAPI bulk operations example payload

userStories.title: Create SearchSettingsRequest ValueObject and Builders
userStories.description: As a developer, I want SearchSettingsRequest ValueObject so that complex search configurations are type-safe.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `SearchConfig` ValueObject containing fields, nested_fields, multi_match_configs
Create `SearchSettingsRequest` ValueObject with all nested configs
Create `SearchSettingsRequestBuilder` with fluent API for full configuration
Unit test compares output against OpenAPI 'full configuration' example

userStories.title: Create API Response ValueObjects
userStories.description: As a developer, I want response ValueObjects so that API responses can be parsed into typed objects.
acceptanceCriteria: All responses have static `fromArray()` factory method for parsing API responses
Update SyncV2Sdk methods to return typed response objects instead of arrays
Unit tests verify parsing of example responses from OpenAPI docs

userStories.title: Update SyncV2Sdk to use ValueObjects
userStories.description: As a developer, I want SyncV2Sdk updated to use ValueObjects so that the public API is fully typed.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove all array-based method signatures (v2 not released, no backward compatibility needed)
All existing tests updated to use new ValueObject API
PHPDoc updated with proper type hints

userStories.title: Comprehensive API payload verification tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want verification tests so that SDK output is guaranteed to match API documentation.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: IndexCreateRequest JSON matches 'Darbo drabuziai client' example exactly
Test: QueryConfigurationRequest JSON matches 'advanced' example exactly
Test: SynonymConfiguration JSON matches 'ecommerce-en' example exactly
Test: BulkOperationsRequest JSON matches 'darbo-drabuziai-indexing' example exactly
Test: SearchSettingsRequest JSON matches 'full configuration' example exactly
Each test loads expected JSON from fixtures, builds equivalent via SDK, compares
Create `tests/fixtures/openapi-examples/` directory with JSON files extracted from OpenAPI
Tests fail if any structural difference detected between SDK output and documented examples

userStories.title: Full workflow simulation test for Darbo Drabuziai client
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a full end-to-end workflow simulation test so that I can verify the entire SDK flow works correctly in the order defined by OpenAPI documentation.
acceptanceCriteria: Step 1 - Create Index v1: Simulate `POST /api/v2/applications/{app_id}/index` with Darbo Drabuziai field definitions (id, name_lt-LT, brand_lt-LT, sku, imageUrl, description_lt-LT, categories_lt-LT, price, variants with attrs)
Step 2 - Set Configuration: Simulate `POST /api/v2/applications/{app_id}/configuration` with Darbo Drabuziai search config (search_fields with boosting, fuzzy_matching, nested variants search)
Step 3 - Sync Initial Data: Simulate `POST /api/v2/applications/{app_id}/sync/bulk-operations` with index_products operation containing Darbo Drabuziai products with variants
Step 4 - Verify Index Info: Simulate `GET /api/v2/applications/{app_id}/index/info` returns v1 as active
Step 5 - Create Index v2 (Migration): Simulate creating new index version for zero-downtime migration
Step 6 - Sync Data to v2: Simulate bulk operations to populate v2 index with updated/new products
Step 7 - Update Configuration: Simulate `PUT /api/v2/applications/{app_id}/configuration` with modified search config
Step 8 - Activate v2: Simulate `POST /api/v2/applications/{app_id}/index/activate` with version 2
Step 9 - Verify Activation: Assert response shows previous_version=1, new_version=2
Test uses mock HttpClient to capture all requests in sequence
Test asserts correct API endpoint order matches OpenAPI workflow documentation
Test asserts all request payloads match expected JSON structure
Test asserts response parsing works correctly for each step
Test covers rollback scenario: activate v1 after v2 issues

userStories.title: Create fromJSON factory methods for Search Configuration ValueObjects
userStories.description: As a developer, I want static fromJSON/fromArray factory methods that parse JSON configuration into ValueObjects so that I can load search configurations from external sources.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `QueryField` with `fromArray()` method supporting both text and nested field types
Update `ResponseConfig` to include highlight and variant enrichment configs
All ValueObjects are immutable with readonly properties
Unit tests verify JSON parsing matches expected ValueObject structure
Unit test with exact JSON from user example produces correct ValueObjects

userStories.title: Create PrestaShopAdapterV2 service for V2 bulk operations
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a PrestaShopAdapterV2 service that transforms PrestaShop data format into V2 Product and ProductVariant ValueObjects so that PrestaShop data can be synced using the BulkOperationsRequest endpoint.
acceptanceCriteria: Method `transformProduct(array $product): Product` for single product transformation
Handles localized fields correctly (name, brand, description, categories)
Handles variants with locale-specific URLs and attributes
Creates proper `ImageUrl` ValueObjects from image data
Returns transformation errors alongside successful products
Unit tests verify transformation from PrestaShop format to V2 format
Unit test uses sample PrestaShop data and verifies BulkOperationsRequest structure
